context: You have learned a lot of Spanish - but mostly as whole phrases you repeat. Here is the secret no one tells beginners: those phrases are made of pieces, and once you can move the pieces around, you can say things nobody taught you.
explanation: No new words this time. You'll take words you already know and put them in order to build full sentences. Tap the tiles in the right order - and tap a tile again to send it back to the bank if you change your mind.
